---
title: "Contact"
---

# Contact

I am open to networking, academic collaboration, and professional opportunities in **business analytics, data analytics, cloud analytics, and machine learning**.

Please feel free to contact me if you are interested in my academic projects, technical skills, or potential collaboration opportunities.

## Contact Information

- **Email:** z2160912@bu.edu
- **GitHub:** [z2160912-tech](https://github.com/z2160912-tech)
- **Portfolio Website:** [https://z2160912-tech.github.io/](https://z2160912-tech.github.io/)

## Areas of Interest

- Business analytics
- Data analytics
- Cloud analytics
- Machine learning
- Data visualization
- Decision-making analytics
- Web analytics
